items.name_en: 《 packaging》💖 M's most special style this year, the Biker Bag, features new vintage soft-touch lambskin. Classic retro charm, soft leather, full leather lining, multi-pocket design blurs the line between function and decoration. Distinctive personality, versatile, sweet or edgy, large capacity. Almost every celebrity and fashion blogger has one, as popular as the previous MiuWander.

items.name_en: Includes full original retail packaging 💖 M's most special biker bag this year, featuring new vintage-soft calfskin. Classic nostalgic style, soft leather, full leather lining, multi-pocket design blurs the line between function and decoration. Distinctive personality, versatile for various styles, sweet yet edgy, great capacity. Almost everyone has one, as popular as the MiuWander.

items.name_en: Includes full original retail packaging 💖 [New] MIU vintage underarm dumpling bag, new vintage-soft calfskin full of retro nostalgia, paired with steel aged metal hardware. High-quality and elegant, drawstring closure design, fine ruffled edges that are 3D and playful, sophisticated yet lazy and casual. Lined with new striped canvas, with a zippered compartment. Unique design looks good on everyone.

items.name_en: 💖Full Original Retail Packaging💖【New】MIU Vintage Crossbody Dumpling Bag, brand new soft calfskin, full of retro nostalgia, paired with aged steel hardware, premium and elegant texture. The bag features a drawstring closure, with fine pleated ruffles that are 3D and playful, sophisticated yet lazy and casual. Lined with brand new striped canvas, equipped with a zippered compartment. A unique design that looks good on everyone.

items.name_en: Top-tier Original M47031 Recalls the classic Cite bag design from the 1980s, defining this HangOn bag with a rich retro vibe. Monogram canvas and WN trim shape a modern bowling bag silhouette, while the lock and nameplate add a brand signature. Zipper closure and adjustable shoulder strap offer flexible carrying. Dimensions: 26 × 11.5 × 6.5 cm

items.name_en: Premium Factory Leather M25497 This Capucines mini bag shines in the 2025 Early Autumn collection with the Bloomcut pattern. Laser-cut calfskin features delicate cutouts, subtly referencing the brand's classic Monogram flower. LV lettering and top handle add rich details; suitable for crossbody, shoulder, or hand carry. Dimensions: 21 × 14 × 8 cm

items.name_en: Premium Factory Leather M25903 Black Small This Capucines small bag draws inspiration from Baroque jewelry, incorporating shell Monogram floral decorations on the chain to reflect the dynamic style of the new Daydream series. Taurillon calfskin creates an exquisite structure, with the flap either open or closed. Removable shoulder strap for flexible carrying. Dimensions: 27 × 17.3 × 9 cm
